title: GitHub CI Assembler - Configuration
description: Defines the pipeline skeleton (stage topology) and workflow root keys for gh-ci-assembler.

version.description: Schema version. Currently only '1' is supported.

on.$comment: Must be map form only — scalar ('on: push') and list shorthand ('on: [push]') are forbidden per spec section 4.1. References the object branch of the upstream oneOf directly, which covers all events including schedule (array of cron objects), push, pull_request, workflow_dispatch, etc.
on.description: Workflow triggers. Must use map form only (no scalar or list shorthand).

env.description: Workflow-level environment variables emitted at root env in the generated workflow.

permissions.description: Base workflow permissions map, deep-merged with package/project permissions overlays.

stages.description: Ordered list of stage names defining the pipeline topology. Names must not contain '--' (reserved separator).

items.$comment: Pattern forbids '--' via negative lookahead: allows single hyphens but not consecutive ones.
